title: mentha × verticillata
intro: Mentha × verticillata, also known as whorled mint or spearmint, is a hybrid plant belonging to the mint family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of whorled mint include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce nausea, and provide relief from stress and anxiety. Whorled mint can be consumed as a tea, added to salads, or used as a flavoring agent in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and infusions.
